remaining_obligations: extend fixed k=22 to the complete required k range
activate the cone-invariance theorem with an all-k entry statement
complete the sign-regularity and Newman-direction bridges
diagnostics.upper_gamma_hazard_bound: Gamma(s,y)<=y^s*exp(-y)/(y-s+1) for y>s-1; this makes every scaled tail term decrease once y-s+1 exceeds its positive T-power.

invariants: The bounded segment and unbounded ray share T=10000 and cover every real T>=1156.
Full-kernel evenness, not finite-truncation near-evenness, supplies the order-42 zero.
All full-kernel n tails are included by geometric Arb majorants.
Every scaled upper-Gamma tail term is proved decreasing on T>=10000.
Fixed k=22 is not promoted to all k or to cone entry.
Endpoint PF, RH, Laguerre-Polya membership, and Lambda <= 0 are forbidden as inputs.

matrix_rows.claim: Import exact full-kernel evenness, disk analyticity, and the order-42 zero of the degree-40 normalized residual.
An Arb n<=80 sum plus geometric n-tail bounds gives a full infinite-kernel majorant on |z|<=0.38.
The order-42 Cauchy factors integrate against the full Gamma moment, yielding value T^-18 and derivative T^-19 scaled decay on T>=10000.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Compact full-kernel residual bound on T>=10000 only.

matrix_rows.claim: Full-kernel value and x*Phi' majorants, including geometric n>80 tails, decrease for x>=1/5.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Full-kernel real-tail majorant on x>=1/5 only.

matrix_rows.claim: The upper-Gamma hazard inequality proves every T-scaled real-tail term decreases from T=10000 onward.
matrix_rows.formula: Gamma(s,y)<=y^s*exp(-y)/(y-s+1) for y>s-1; this makes every scaled tail term decrease once y-s+1 exceeds its positive T-power.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Exact monotonicity lemma for the recorded shapes and powers on T>=10000.

matrix_rows.claim: For every real T>=10000 and i=21..24, the full residuals satisfy |R_i|<=(1/2)T^-3 and |R_i'|<=(9/1000)T^-1.

proof_boundary: Uniform full real-T fixed-k=22 residual and stencil theorem for every T>=1156. It does not cover all k, does not by itself prove cone entry or sign regularity, and does not prove RH or Lambda <= 0.

summary.main_finding: Exact full-kernel evenness gives an order-42 residual zero. A full-kernel disk majorant, factored Cauchy bound, full real-tail majorant, and upper-Gamma hazard monotonicity certify the rational residual budgets on every T>=10000. Combined with the bounded segment theorem, the complete fixed-k=22 stencil system is now certified for every real T>=1156. Remaining k coverage, cone entry, sign regularity, RH, and Lambda <= 0 remain open.
